data.biography:
1991年出生在新西兰，父亲是中国人，母亲是新西兰人，目前定居在北京。毕业于世界名校新西兰威灵顿维多利亚大学， 并获得理科（生物学）和文科（亚洲研究）双学士学位。

　　 首部电影《终极胜利》已于2016 年7月在中国内地上映，徐嘉雯出任 女一号，合作演员是好莱坞知名男星约瑟夫费因斯和内地当红小生窦 骁。本片突出了战争硝烟下的无疆大爱，真实再现了潍县集中营这一 世界反法西斯战争中的重要篇章。

　　 在成为一位演员前，大学就读生物学的徐嘉雯毕业后就在中国最大的 环保新能源公司担任Senior International Project Manager，致力于更清洁、更环保的生物能源项目， 这个项目也是和联合国发展署一起合

　　作的，目的在于推动清洁和可持续发展能源的推广和使用。 目前徐嘉 雯仍然在持续坚持参与这一项工作。
data.name: 徐嘉雯

data.biography:
1991 年出生在紐西蘭，父親是中國人，母親是紐西蘭人，目前定居在北京。畢業於世界名校紐西蘭威靈頓維多利亞大學， 並獲得理科（生物學）和文科（亞洲研究）雙學士學位。

首部電影《終極勝利》已於 2016 年 7 月在中國內地上映，徐嘉雯出任 女一號，合作演員是好萊塢知名男星約瑟夫費因斯和內地當紅小生竇 驍。本片突出了戰爭硝煙下的無疆大愛，真實再現了濰縣集中營這一 世界反法西斯戰爭中的重要篇章。

在成為一位演員前，大學就讀生物學的徐嘉雯畢業後就在中國最大的 環保新能源公司擔任 Senior International Project Manager，致力於更清潔、更環保的生物能源項目， 這個項目也是和聯合國發展署一起合

作的，目的在於推動清潔和可持續發展能源的推廣和使用。

目前徐嘉 雯仍然在持續堅持參與這一項工作。
data.name: 徐嘉雯

data.biography:
Serge Hazanavicius est un acteur français né à Paris le 11 septembre 1963. Il est le frère aîné de Michel Hazanavicius.

Serge Hazanavicius naît au sein d'une famille d'origine juive lituanienne. Ses grands-parents s'installent en France dans les années 1920. Il a fait partie du groupe comique Les Nouveaux, aux côtés d'Éric Aubrahn, Jules-Édouard Moustic, Pierre Lacan, Emmanuel Patron et Alexandre Pesle. Après plusieurs téléfilms et documentaires, il réalise son premier long métrage de cinéma, Tout là-haut, sorti en 2017.

Source: Article "Serge Hazanavicius" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

乔欣，1993年11月23日出生于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，中国内地女演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系。

2012年，因参演家庭剧《七九河开》从而正式进入演艺圈。2014年，参演古装传奇剧《琅琊榜》。2016年，凭借都市情感剧《欢乐颂》关睢尔一角受到观众关注，并凭该角色获得爱奇艺尖叫之夜年度电视剧新人奖；之后，主演古装传奇剧《琅琊榜之风起长林》。2017年5月，主演的都市情感剧《欢乐颂2》播出；8月，主演后青春时代都市励志剧《趁我们还年轻》。

data.biography:
Johann Urb (born January 24, 1977 in Tallinn, Estonia) is an Estonian-American actor and former model.

Johann Urb was born in Tallinn to parents Tarmo and Maris Urb. His father is an Estonian musician and the brother of actor and singer Toomas Urb. At the age of ten, he moved to live in Finland with his mother and her new Finnish husband, where he was raised primarily in Tampere. After turning 17, Urb moved to the United States, where his father lived, and began his career in modeling in New York City, which led him later on to pursuing a career in acting. He studied drama at the Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute.

Johann Urb（1977 年 1 月 24 日出生于爱沙尼亚塔林）是爱沙尼亚裔美国演员和前模特。

Johann Urb 出生于塔林，父母是 Tarmo 和 Maris Urb。他的父亲是爱沙尼亚音乐家，也是演员兼歌手托马斯·乌尔布的兄弟。十岁时，他与母亲和她的新芬兰丈夫一起搬到芬兰生活，主要在坦佩雷长大。17 岁后，Urb 搬到了他父亲居住的美国，并在纽约市开始了他的模特生涯，这使他后来从事演艺事业。他曾在李·斯特拉斯伯格戏剧和电影学院学习戏剧。
data.name: 乔翰·厄布

data.biography:
Randall Park (born March 23, 1974) is an American actor and filmmaker. He is best known for his role as Louis Huang in the ABC sitcom Fresh Off the Boat (2015–2020), for which he was nominated for the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Actor in a Comedy Series in 2016.

Before these major roles, Park gained popularity by playing Steve, a prank replacement of Jim Halpert (dubbed "Asian Jim") in an episode of the NBC sitcom The Office, and starring in the recurring role of Governor Danny Chung in the HBO comedy series Veep. He also co-starred in and co-wrote the Netflix romantic comedy film Always Be My Maybe (2019) alongside Ali Wong and directed the comedy-drama film Shortcomings (2023).

Park played Agent Jimmy Woo in the Marvel Cinematic Universe films, including Ant-Man and the Wasp (2018), the miniseries WandaVision (2021), and the film Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania (2023). He played a future version of himself in the 2021 Dwayne Johnson autobiographical comedy series Young Rock and portrayed North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un in the comedy film The Interview. He has also appeared in the DC Extended Universe films Aquaman (2018) and Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom (2023) as Dr. Stephen Shin.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Randall Park, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography:
Randall Park (ur. 23 marca 1974) to amerykański aktor i filmowiec. Najbardziej znany jest z roli Louisa Huanga w sitcomie ABC Przepis na amerykański sen (2015–2020), za którą został nominowany do nagrody Critics' Choice Television Award dla najlepszego aktora w serialu komediowym w 2016 roku.

Przed tymi głównymi rolami Park zyskał popularność, grając Steve'a, żartobliwego zastępcę Jima Halperta (nazywanego „Asian Jim”) w odcinku sitcomu NBC Biuro, a także grając w powracającej roli gubernatora Danny'ego Chunga w serialu komediowym HBO Figurantka. Zagrał również jedną z głównych ról i był współautorem scenariusza komedii romantycznej Netflixa Chyba na pewno ty (2019) u boku Ali Wong, a także wyreżyserował komediodramat Shortcomings (2023).

Park grał Agenta Jimmy'ego Woo w filmach Marvel Cinematic Universe, w tym Ant-Man i Osa (2018), miniserialu WandaVision (2021) i filmie Ant-Man i Osa: Quantumania (2023). Zagrał przyszłą wersję samego siebie w autobiograficznym serialu komediowym Dwayne'a Johnsona z 2021 roku Young Rock i wcielił się w północnokoreańskiego dyktatora Kim Dzong Una w filmie komediowym Wywiad ze Słońcem Narodu. Wystąpił również w filmach DC Extended Universe Aquaman (2018) i Aquaman i Zaginione Królestwo (2023) jako Dr. Stephen Shin.

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Randall Park, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

Quentin became known for her television appearances: portraying Dorothy in Men Behaving Badly (1992–1998), Maddie Magellan in Jonathan Creek (1997–2000), and DCI Janine Lewis in Blue Murder (2003–2009).Quentin received an Ian Charleson Award commendation for her Masha in The Seagull at the Oxford Theatre Company in 1991.[5] Her early stage work had also included appearing in the chorus of the original English production of the musical Les Misérables in 1985.

In July 1996, Quentin released a single, a cover of the Exciters' hit "Tell Him", with her Men Behaving Badly co-star Leslie Ash under the name of "Quentin and Ash". The single reached number 25 in the UK Singles Chart and spent 3 weeks in that listing.[6] From 1997 until 2000 Quentin starred alongside Alan Davies in Jonathan Creek playing investigative journalist Maddie Magellan, who uses Jonathan's mind to solve murder mysteries.

Quentin appeared in the 2001 telefilm Hot Money, which was based on the true story of the theft of hundreds of thousands of pounds from the Bank of England. In 1998 she starred in the first sitcom that was specifically built around her: Kiss Me, Kate. At the British Comedy Awards in 2004, Quentin won the "Best Comedy Actress" award for her performance in Von Trapped; that year she started the major role of Maggie Mee in the popular drama Life Begins, which returned for a third series in 2006.

ITV has produced five series of the police drama Blue Murder, in which Quentin plays against type in the main role DCI Janine Lewis. The pilot aired in the UK on 18 May 2003.[7][8]

Quentin has appeared in Whose Line Is It Anyway?; in a pre-Men Behaving Badly role as a traffic warden in the Mr. Bean episode The Trouble with Mr. Bean in 1991; Room 101; Have I Got News for You; and the 2009–10 BBC comedy series Life of Riley, a sitcom about a dysfunctional blended family; and in the BBC Radio 4 improvisational comedy series The Masterson Inheritance and the popular BBC Radio 2 sitcom On the Blog.

On 11 January 2009, Quentin stated on the show Something for the Weekend that she would return to Jonathan Creek in the future if the offer came.

She appeared as Heather Babcock in an episode of Agatha Christie's Miss Marple, The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side, in 2010. Also in 2010 she started appearing in Marks and Spencer's revamped food range advertisements.[9]

In March 2011, a documentary entitled Caroline Quentin: A Passage Through India aired on ITV in the UK. The documentary followed Quentin as she traveled from the North of India to the South.[10]

Quentin presents Restoration Home on BBC Two. The programme looks into the history and families of the UK's derelict mansion houses which are being restored by their private owners.
data.name: Caroline Quentin

data.biography:
Judith Therese Evans (born July 20, 1975), known professionally as Judy Greer, is an American actress. She is primarily known as a character actress who has appeared in various films. She rose to prominence for her supporting roles in the films Jawbreaker (1999), What Women Want (2000), 13 Going on 30 (2004), Elizabethtown (2005), 27 Dresses (2008), and Love & Other Drugs (2010).

Greer expanded into multiple genres with roles in films, such as The Wedding Planner (2001), Adaptation (2002), The Village (2004), The Descendants (2011), Jeff, Who Lives at Home (2011), Carrie (2013), Men, Women & Children (2014), Grandma (2015), Lemon (2017), Where'd You Go, Bernadette (2019), Uncle Frank (2020), and Hollywood Stargirl (2022). She appeared in numerous blockbusters, such as Dawn of the Planet of the Apes (2014) and its sequel War for the Planet of the Apes (2017), Jurassic World (2015), Halloween (2018) and its sequel Halloween Kills (2021), and the Marvel Cinematic Universe films Ant-Man (2015), Ant-Man and the Wasp (2018), and Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 (2023). She made her directorial debut with the comedy-drama film A Happening of Monumental Proportions (2017).

Greer is best known on television for her starring voice role as Cheryl Tunt in the FXX animated comedy series Archer (2009–2023) and Lina Bowman in the FX sitcom Married (2014–2015). She also appeared in the comedy series The Big Bang Theory (2007–2019), Arrested Development (2003–2006, 2013–2019), Two and a Half Men (2003–2015), It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia (2007–2011), Kidding (2018–2020), Let's Go Luna! (2018–2022), and Reboot (2022).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Judy Greer, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Judy Greer

data.biography:
Judy Greer (* 20. Juli 1975 in Detroit, Michigan, als Judith Laura Evans) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Aufgrund von ähnlichen Namen anderer Schauspielerinnen (Judy Evans o. ä.) wählte Evans den Geburtsnamen ihrer Mutter, Greer, als Bühnennamen. Judy Greer studierte Schauspiel an der DePaul University in Chicago, die sie 1997 abschloss. Bereits drei Tage danach wurde sie für Zwei Männer, eine Frau und eine Hochzeit engagiert und zog nach Los Angeles. Danach spielte sie in vielen Filmen, unter anderem in Wedding Planner – Verliebt, verlobt, verplant (2001), Adaption – Der Orchideen-Dieb (2002) und Elizabethtown (2005). 2004 wurde sie für ihre Rolle der Lucy Wyman in der Komödie 30 über Nacht für den Teen Choice Award nominiert. In der erfolgreichen Chuck-Lorre-Sitcom Two and a Half Men spielte Greer in zwei Folgen der vierten Staffel 2007 Myra Lang, die Schwester von Herb Melnick, die eine kurze Beziehung mit Charlie Harper hatte.

In der FX-Zeichentrickserie Archer spricht Greer seit 2009 in der Originalversion die Cheryl Tunt. In der ebenfalls von Lorre geschaffenen Serie The Big Bang Theory spielte Greer 2010 Sheldons Brieffreundin Dr. Elizabeth Plimpton. 2011 war sie in der Sitcom Mad Love in der Hauptrolle der Connie Grabowski neben Sarah Chalke und Jason Biggs zu sehen, die Serie hatte lediglich 13 Folgen.

Für die neunte Staffel von Two and a Half Men wurde Greer 2011 als wiederkehrender Gaststar verpflichtet. Sie übernahm die Rolle Bridget Schmidt, der Noch-Ehefrau der neuen Hauptfigur Walden Schmidt.

Ihr Schaffen umfasst mehr als 100 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen.

💥Джуди Эванс Грир. Родилась в 1975-ом году в Детройте, Мичиган, США. Росла в семье с младшим братом. Отец работал инженером-механиком, а мать была монахиней. Училась в Театральной школе при Университете ДеПол в Чикаго. Работает актрисой, режиссёром и писательницей. С 2011-го замужем за продюсером Дином Джонсоном, детей у пары нет

data.biography:
Judy Greer (née le 20 juillet 1975, taille 1,73 m) est une actrice américaine connue pour avoir incarné une série de personnages de soutien, dont Kitty Sanchez dans la série Fox/Netflix Arrested Development et Cheryl Tunt dans la série comique animée Archer. Greer a eu un second rôle dans plusieurs films de comédie romantique, dont The Wedding Planner, 13 Going on 30, 27 Dresses et Love and Other Drugs. Elle a également eu un second rôle dans le film The Descendants, sorti en 2011. En 2011, Greer a commencé à héberger une série de vidéos d'entraînement en ligne intitulée Reluctantly Healthy.

Début de vie

Greer est née à Detroit, Michigan, le 20 juillet 1975, et a grandi dans le canton de Redford et à Livonia. Elle a été élevée dans la religion catholique. Greer a fréquenté le lycée Churchill et l'académie de danse Bunny Sanfords à Livonia. En 1997, elle est diplômée de l'école de théâtre de l'université DePaul.

Vie personnelle

Greer est mariée à Dean E. Johnsen, un producteur exécutif de Real Time avec Bill Maher.

Judy Greer (nacida el 20 de julio de 1975, altura, 5 '8 "(1,73 m)) es una actriz estadounidense conocida por interpretar una serie de personajes secundarios, como Kitty Sánchez en la serie de Fox / Netflix Arrested Development y Cheryl Tunt en la serie de comedia animada Archer. Greer ha tenido un papel secundario en varias películas de comedia romántica, como The Wedding Planner, 13 Going on 30, 27 Dresses y Love and Other Drugs. También tuvo un papel secundario en la película de 2011 The Descendants En 2011, Greer comenzó a presentar una serie en línea de videos de ejercicios llamados Renuentemente saludable.

Vida temprana

Greer nació en Detroit, Michigan el 20 de julio de 1975 y creció en Redford Township y Livonia. Fue criada como católica. Greer asistió a Churchill High School y Bunny Sanfords Academy of Dance en Livonia. En 1997 se graduó de The Theatre School en DePaul University.

Vida personal

Greer está casada con Dean E. Johnsen, productor ejecutivo de Real Time con Bill Maher.

data.biography: Lee Ji-eun (Hangul: 이지은; born May 16, 1993), commonly known by her stage name IU (Hangul: 아이유), is a South Korean singer-songwriter and actress. She made her first television debut in 2011 with Dream High. She has won acclaim for her roles in South Korean dramas The Producers (2015), Moon Lovers: Scarlet Heart Ryeo (2016), My Mister (2018), and Hotel Del Luna (2019). She has also starred in a Netflix anthology series Persona (2019). Lee's most recent work includes the 2021 film Dream.
아이유(IU, 본명: 이지은, 李知恩, 1993년 5월 16일~)는 대한민국의 가수이자 배우, 유튜버이다. 배우로 활동할 때는 본명을 사용한다. '아이유(IU)' 라는 이름은 'I'와 'You'를 합친 합성어로 '너와 내가 음악으로 하나가 된다.' 라는 의미이다.
data.name: IU

data.biography:
李知恩（朝鲜语：이지은 Lee Ji Eun，英语：Lee Ji Eun，1993年5月16日－），艺名IU（朝鲜语：아이유 A I Yu ），韩国创作歌手、女演员。

她于2007年与LOEN娱乐签约成为练习生，15岁时推出首张迷你专辑《Lost and Found》，开始歌手生涯。之后发行的专辑《Growing Up》和《IU...IM》使IU的知名度上涨。真正让IU在韩国全国走红的是她在2010年发布的专辑《Real》的主打歌《好日子》（韩语：좋은 날）。《好日子》连续五周位居韩国Gaon数位榜榜首，与PSY的《江南Style》共同保持着维持一位周数最长的记录。在2011年发行的专辑《Real+》和《Last Fantasy》相继取得成功后，IU在韩国的音乐排行榜确立强势地位，并进一步巩固邻家女孩的形象，得到“国民妹妹”的称号。IU在2013年发行的第3张正规专辑《Modern Times》展现成熟风格，与之前树立的少女形象不同。IU后来发行的专辑《花书签》和《CHAT-SHIRE》都与韩国的主流音乐风格背离，却没有动摇她在音乐排行榜的主导地位。

IU共发布4张录音室专辑和9张迷你专辑，在Gaon榜有2张专辑和14首歌曲获得第一名。在男女音乐团体团体为主的韩国流行音乐产业中，IU 是最畅销的独唱艺人之一。自2012年起一直位列《福布斯》杂志的年度韩国名人权力榜40强之一，2012年达到最高的第3名。告示牌将IU认可为韩国流行音乐百强榜的先锋，她是拥有最多的冠军歌曲并且是维持第一位置周数最长的艺人。

韩国音乐著作权协会登记编号为10000992。
data.name: 李知恩 (IU)

data.biography:
Lee Ji Eun, známější pod uměleckým jménem IU, je jihokorejská zpěvačka, skladatelka a herečka. Její umělecké jméno je odvozeno od fráze "I and You" (Já a Ty), která symbolizuje, že lidé mohou splynout prostřednictvím hudby. IU debutovala v pořadu "Mnet M! Countdown" 18. září 2008 se svým debutovým singlem "Lost Child". Popularitu v mainstreamu však získala až v prosinci 2010, kdy si díky hitu "Good Day" získala obrovskou slávu a vysloužila si titul "malá sestra národa".

V průběhu let si vybudovala impozantní pověst "hudební královny/bohyně" díky svým trvalým úspěchům na nejvyšších příčkách hitparád spolu s velkým podílem na skládání, psaní textů a produkci svých alb. Dodnes zůstává nejprodávanější ženskou sólovkou na hudebních streamovacích službách a patří k nejvlivnějším osobnostem v oblasti zábavy.

Kromě hudební kariéry se IU věnuje moderování rozhlasových a televizních pořadů a také herectví. Jako herečka debutovala vedlejší rolí v seriálu pro teenagery "Dream High".

韓国出身の歌手、作詞作曲家、俳優。

中学生の時に歌手を志し、2008年に15歳で歌手デビュー。音楽番組やラジオ出演で徐々に人気を獲得し、韓国では「国民の妹」と称されるようになる。11年にペ・ヨンジュンと敏腕プロデューサーとして知られるJ・Y・Parkが企画した青春ドラマ「ドリームハイ」で俳優デビューし、同年には自身が作曲を手掛けた曲「私の手をとって」がTVドラマ「最高の愛　恋はドゥグンドゥグン」のOSTに起用された。以降、歌手活動と俳優業を並行し、TVドラマ初主演を飾った「最高です！スンシンちゃん」やチャン・グンソクと共演した「キレイな男」（ともに13）、「プロデューサー」（15）、「麗（レイ）　花萌ゆる8人の皇子たち」（16）、「マイ･ディア･ミスター　私のおじさん」（18）、「ホテルデルーナ　月明かりの恋人」（19）など数々のTVドラマに出演する。

19年に映画初主演となる短編作品「ペルソナ　仮面の下の素顔」に出演し、その後も映画「夜明けの詩」（21）や是枝裕和監督作「ベイビー・ブローカー」（22）でも主要キャストを務める。25年にはパク・ボゴムと初共演したTVドラマ「おつかれさま」に出演した。

当初、俳優活動時は本名のイ・ジウンを使用していたが、2023 年 3 月以降は IU 名義に統 一すると発表している。

Lee Ji-eun (Hangul: 이지은; nacida el 16 de mayo de 1993), comúnmente conocida por su nombre artístico IU (Hangul: 아이유), es una cantautora y actriz surcoreana. Debutó en televisión en 2011 con Dream High. Ha sido aclamada por sus papeles en los dramas surcoreanos The Producers (2015), Moon Lovers: Scarlet Heart Ryeo (2016), My Mister (2018) y Hotel Del Luna (2019). También ha protagonizado una serie antológica de Netflix, Persona (2019). El trabajo más reciente de Lee incluye la película Dream (2021).

data.biography:
Wunmi Mosaku wurde am 31. Juli 1986 in Zaria, Nigeria, geboren und wuchs ab dem Kleinkindalter in Manchester, England, auf. Sie ist eine britische Schauspielerin, die für ihre vielseitigen Rollen in Film und Fernsehen bekannt ist. Zu ihren bekanntesten Arbeiten zählen die Hauptrolle im gefeierten Horrorfilm His House (2020), ihre Darstellung der Ruby Baptiste in Lovecraft Country (2020) sowie Auftritte in den Serien Loki (2021–2023) und We Own This City (2022).

Mosaku gewann 2017 den BAFTA TV Award als Beste Nebendarstellerin für ihre Rolle in Damilola, Our Loved Boy und wurde für zahlreiche weitere Preise nominiert. Sie spielte zudem in internationalen Produktionen wie Deadpool & Wolverine (2024) und Sinners (2025). Ihre Theaterausbildung absolvierte sie an der Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) in London, die sie 2007 abschloss.

Wunmi Mosaku engagiert sich als Botschafterin für ActionAid und nennt als persönliche Vorbilder ihre Großmutter, den Schauspieler Albert Finney sowie Oprah Winfrey. Sie ist verheiratet und Mutter einer Tochter.

Oluwunmi Olapeju Mosaku (born 31 July 1986), known professionally as Wunmi Mosaku, is a Nigerian-British actress. She rose to prominence for her roles as Joy in the BBC Two miniseries Moses Jones (2009) and Holly Lawson in the ITV series Vera (2011–2012). She won the BAFTA TV Award for Best Supporting Actress for her role as Gloria Taylor in the TV film Damilola, Our Loved Boy (2016). In 2019, she appeared in the fifth season of Luther, followed by her role as Ruby Baptiste in HBO's Lovecraft Country (2020). She portrayed the character Hunter B-15 in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) Disney+ series Loki (2021–2023). She reprised the role in the film Deadpool & Wolverine (2024). 

Mosaku was nominated for the BAFTA for Best Actress and won the BIFA for Best Performance by an Actress in a British Independent Film for her role as Rial in the film His House (2020). For her performance as Annie in the 2025 horror film Sinners, Mosaku won the Gotham Independent Film Award for Outstanding Supporting Performance and was nominated for an Academy Award for Best Actress in a Supporting Role, a Critics' Choice Movie Award for Best Supporting Actress, and an Actors Award for Outstanding Performance by a Female Actor in a Supporting Role.

data.biography:
Oluwunmi Mosaku, 31 Ekim 1986 tarihinde Zaria, Nijerya'da dünyaya gelmiş, Nijerya asıllı bir İngiliz aktrisdir. Henüz bir yaşındayken ailesiyle birlikte Manchester, İngiltere'ye göç etti. Prestijli Kraliyet Dramatik Sanatlar Akademisi'nden (Royal Academy of Dramatic Art - RADA) mezun olarak oyunculuk kariyerine sağlam bir temel attı.

Kariyerinin başlarında tiyatro sahnesinde ve "Vera" gibi popüler İngiliz dizilerinde yer aldı. Çıkışını, gerçek bir hikayeye dayanan ve eleştirmenlerden büyük övgü alan "Damilola, Our Loved Boy" (2016) adlı TV filmindeki performansıyla yaptı. Bu filmde canlandırdığı Gloria Taylor rolü, ona 2017 yılında En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında BAFTA Ödülü'nü kazandırarak yeteneğini tescilledi. Ayrıca, kült statüsüne ulaşan "The End of the F***ing World" dizisindeki Dedektif Teri Darego rolü ve Netflix yapımı korku filmi "His House"daki (2020) başrol performansıyla da büyük beğeni topladı.

Uluslararası alanda tanınırlığını artıran projeler ise HBO'nun fantastik korku dizisi "Lovecraft Country" (2020) ve Marvel Sinema Evreni'nde yer alan "Loki" (2021–2023) dizisi oldu. "Lovecraft Country"deki Ruby Baptiste rolüyle Emmy ve SAG Ödülleri'ne aday gösterildi. "Loki"de canlandırdığı kararlı ve sadık Hunter B-15 karakteri ise onu dünya çapında geniş bir izleyici kitlesiyle buluşturdu. 2024 yapımı "Deadpool & Wolverine" filminde de Dr. Verity Willis rolüyle yer alarak Marvel evrenindeki varlığını sürdürmüştür.

Canlandırdığı karakterlere kattığı derinlik, duygusal yoğunluk ve güçlü duruşuyla tanınan Mosaku, günümüzün en yetenekli ve çok yönlü aktrislerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

Oluwunmi Mosaku, dite Wunmi Mosaku, est une actrice nigériano-britannique née le 31 juillet 1986 à Zaria, au Nigeria.

Elle acquiert une notoriété à partir de 2009 pour son rôle de Joy dans la mini-série de la BBC Two Moses Jones,  pour lequel elle obtient le prix de la meilleure actrice dans une mini-série au festival de fiction à Rome. Entre 2021 et 2023, elle interprète le rôle de Verity Willis / Hunter B-15 dans la série Loki, qu'elle reprendra dans le film Deadpool et Wolverine (2024).

data.biography:
Park Myung-shin (박명신), nacida el 28 de marzo de 1964 en Jeonju, Corea del Sur, es una actriz surcoreana con una sólida trayectoria en cine, televisión y teatro. Su formación académica incluye estudios en la Facultad de Farmacia de la Universidad Ewha Womans (licenciatura en Farmacia) y una especialización en actuación en la Escuela de Teatro de la Universidad Nacional de las Artes de Corea, donde ingresó como parte de la primera generación.

Comenzó su carrera en el teatro, formando parte del grupo Teatro Hangang, antes de debutar en cine con Oasis (2002) de Lee Chang-dong, en un papel secundario. Desde entonces, ha participado en más de 60 películas, incluyendo títulos como Oldboy (2003), Train to Busan (2016), Missing (2016), 1987 (2017), Herstory (2018), Cassiopeia (2022), y Face (2025), en roles que van desde madres, cuidadoras y figuras comunitarias hasta protagonistas en dramas independientes. En televisión, ha interpretado personajes secundarios y episódicos en más de 40 dramas, entre ellos Tunnel (OCN), Her Private Life (tvN), Bo-ra! Deborah (2023), Bulgasal (tvN), Monster (JTBC), Voice 3 (OCN), Doctor John (SBS) y Good Partner (SBS, 2024).

Actualmente está representada por la agencia Billions, junto a actores como Go Chang-seok, Son Hyun-joo y Huh Sung-tae.
data.name: Park Myung-shin

data.biography:
Wallace Wolodarsky (born February 15, 1963) is an American television writer and director. He wrote for The Simpsons during the first four seasons; all of his episodes were co-written with former writing partner Jay Kogen. Since he left, he has directed several films (the most notable being Sorority Boys).

According to DVD commentary for the season 9 episode, "Miracle on Evergreen Terrace", Wolodarsky had a wiffle ball bat that read "I KEELL YOU!" which was one of the threats spray-painted on The Simpsons' car after the family is shunned by the town for lying to them about a robber stealing the family's Christmas tree.

The character "Vladimir Wolodarsky" in The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou was named after him. He has roles in Rushmore and The Darjeeling Limited, and is a voice actor in Fantastic Mr. Fox.
data.name: Wallace Wolodarsky

data.biography: 华莱士·沃洛达尔斯基（1963年2月15日-），美国电视编剧、导演。他在前四个赛季为《辛普森一家》撰稿;他所有的剧集都是与前编剧搭档杰伊·高原（Jay Kogen）共同编写的。自从他离开后，他执导了几部电影（最著名的是《联谊会男孩》）。
data.name: 华莱士·沃洛达尔斯基

data.biography:
Wallace Wolodarsky (ur. 15 lutego 1963) jest amerykańskim scenarzystą telewizyjnym i reżyserem. Pisał dla Simpsonowie przez pierwsze cztery sezony; wszystkie jego odcinki były współtworzone z byłym partnerem scenarzysty Jayem Kogenem. Od czasu odejścia wyreżyserował kilka filmów (najbardziej znanym jest Sorority Boys).

Według komentarza DVD do odcinka sezonu 9, „Miracle on Evergreen Terrace”, Wolodarsky miał kij do wiffle ball z napisem „I KEELL YOU!”, co było jedną z gróźb namalowanych sprayem na samochodzie Simpsonów po tym, jak rodzina została odrzucona przez miasto za kłamstwo na temat złodzieja, który ukradł rodzinną choinkę.

Postać „Vladimir Wolodarsky” w Podwodne życie ze Steve’em Zissou została nazwana na jego cześć. Ma role w Rushmore i Pociąg do Darjeeling, a także jest aktorem głosowym w Fantastyczny pan Lis.

More recently she starred in the film What's Your Number? (2011), she held a recurring role opposite Zach Galifinakis in the HBO series Bored to Death and plays Trish in the Amazon webseries Sneaky Pete (2017).

data.biography:
Romain Bouteille (24 March 1937 – 31 May 2021) was a French playwright, actor, comedian, and singer.

Romain Bouteille is the author of nearly thirty plays of anarchist inspiration. In 1968, he met Coluche. Together, they founded the troupe Café de la Gare. The same year, he separated from his partner Sotha who married Patrick Dewaere. Both are members of the troupe.

Bouteille was married to the actress Saïda Churchill, with whom he has lived for thirty years. After spending three years in Marseilles where their son Shams was born, in 1997, they settled in Beauce, in Étampes. In December 2014, together they created a fifty-seat theater, a sort of “Left Bank” cabaret called Les Grands Solistes. About fifty artists, including François Rollin, Albert Meslay, Clair Jaz, Didier Porte, Marc Gélas, Fred Saurel, Paul Adam, Vincent Roca, Christophe Guybet, but also, in another register, Jean Vocat, Frédéric Hulné, Prune Lichtlé, have already happened there.

Source: Article "Romain Bouteille" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Romain Bouteille

data.biography:
Romain Bouteille est un auteur de théâtre, acteur, humoriste et chanteur français né le 24 mars 1937 à Paris et mort le 31 mai 2021 à Corbeil-Essonnes. Il est l’un des précurseurs du café-théâtre et l'auteur de près de trente pièces de théâtre d'inspiration anarchiste.

En 1966, Bouteille fait son premier one-man-show au Théâtre de la Vieille-Grille, après avoir croisé Jacques Higelin, Brigitte Fontaine, Rufus, Bernard Haller et beaucoup d'autres jeunes comédiens.

En 1968, Romain Bouteille rencontre Coluche. Ils «fondent» ensemble, avec Henri Guybet, Patrick Dewaere et Miou-Miou, la troupe du Café de la Gare. Mais, dans une interview au Monde en 1999, à la question des fondateurs, il répond: «C’est une façon de parler: l’intérêt et la force du Café de la Gare, c’est l’absence de fondateur. Un fondateur choisit ceux qui vont travailler avec lui; il apporte une discipline précise. Coluche et moi, on n’a pas choisi. […] Je préfère penser que le Café de la Gare est une sorte d’accident. »

Toujours en 1968, il se sépare de sa compagne Sotha qui épouse Patrick Dewaere, tous deux membres de la troupe du Café de la Gare.

Marié en 1988 à la comédienne Saïda Churchill, Romain Bouteille s'éloigne du Café de la Gare au début des années 1990. Après avoir passé trois ans à Marseille où naît leur fils Shams, en 1997, ils s'installent à Étampes. En décembre 2014, ils y créent un théâtre de cinquante places, une sorte de cabaret «rive gauche» baptisé Les Grands Solistes. Une cinquantaine d'artistes, dont François Rollin, Albert Meslay, Clair Jaz, Didier Porte, Marc Gélas, Fred Saurel, Paul Adam, Vincent Roca, Christophe Guybet, mais aussi, dans un autre registre, Jean Vocat, Frédéric Hulné, Prune Lichtlé, s'y sont déjà produits.

Il meurt le 31 mai 2021 à l'âge de 84 ans d'insuffisance respiratoire à l'hôpital de Corbeil-Essonnes. Ses obsèques ont lieu le 8 juin à la collégiale de Notre-Dame-du-Fort d'Étampes (Essonne), suivies de l'inhumation au cimetière Saint-Pierre de la même ville.  Concernant ses motivations, Romain Bouteille déclare en 2005:  «Ma vocation artistique s’est dessinée vers 1955 sous l’angle: trouver un job qui permette de se lever à n’importe quelle heure et ne suppose ni diplôme, ni réel travail, ni obéissance.»

Coluche a dit à son propos: «Ce qu'il ne m'a pas appris, je le lui ai piqué.»

Source: Article "Romain Bouteille" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Robert Bushnell Ryan (November 11, 1909 – July 11, 1973) was an American  actor who often played hardened cops and ruthless villains.

Ryan was born in Chicago, Illinois, the first child of Timothy Ryan and his wife Mabel Bushnell Ryan.  He graduated from Dartmouth College in 1932, having held the school's heavyweight boxing title all four years of his attendance. After graduation, the 6'4" Ryan found employment as a stoker on a ship, a WPA worker, and a ranch hand in Montana.

Ryan attempted to make a career in show business as a playwright, but had to turn to acting to support himself. He studied acting in Hollywood and appeared on stage and in small film parts during the early 1940s.

In January 1944, after securing a contract guarantee from RKO Radio Pictures, Ryan enlisted in the United States Marine Corps and served as a drill instructor at Camp Pendleton, in San Diego, California. At Camp Pendleton, he befriended writer and future director Richard Brooks, whose novel, The Brick Foxhole, he greatly admired. He also took up painting.

Ryan's breakthrough film role was as an anti-Semitic killer in Crossfire (1947), a film noir based on Brooks's novel. The role won Ryan his sole career Oscar nomination, for Best Supporting Actor. From then on, Ryan's specialty was tough/tender roles, finding particular expression in the films of directors such as Nicholas Ray, Robert Wise and Sam Fuller. In Ray's On Dangerous Ground (1951) he portrayed a burnt-out city cop finding redemption while solving a rural murder. In Wise's The Set-Up (1949), he played an over-the-hill boxer who is brutally punished for refusing to take a dive. Other important films were Anthony Mann's western The Naked Spur, Sam Fuller's uproarious Japanese set gangland thriller House of Bamboo, Bad Day at Black Rock, and the socially conscious heist movie Odds Against Tomorrow. He also appeared in several all-star war films, including The Longest Day (1962) and Battle of the Bulge (1965), and The Dirty Dozen. He also played John the Baptist in MGM's Technicolor epic King of Kings (1961) and was the villainous Claggart in Peter Ustinov's adaptation of Billy Budd (1962).

In his later years, Ryan continued playing significant roles in major films. Most notable of these were The Dirty Dozen, The Professionals (1966) and Sam Peckinpah's highly influential brutal western The Wild Bunch (1969).

Ryan appeared several times on the Broadway stage. His credits there include Clash by Night, Mr. President and The Front Page, the comedy drama about newspapermen.

He appeared in many television series as a guest star, including the role of Franklin Hoppy-Hopp in the 1964 episode "Who Chopped Down the Cherry Tree?" on the NBC medical drama about psychiatry, The Eleventh Hour. Similarly, he guest starred as Lloyd Osment in the 1964 episode "Better Than a Dead Lion" in the ABC psychiatric series, Breaking Point. In 1964, Ryan appeared with Warren Oates in the episode "No Comment" of CBS's short-lived drama about newspapers, The Reporter, starring Harry Guardino in the title role of journalist Danny Taylor. Ryan appeared five times (1956–1959) on CBS's Dick Powell's Zane Grey Theater and twice (1959 and 1961) on the Zane Grey spin-off Frontier Justice. He appeared three times (1962–1964) on the western Wagon Train.
data.name: Robert Ryan

data.biography:
В 1932 окончил Дартмутский колледж, всё четыре года обучения сохраняя звание чемпиона по боксу в тяжёлом весе. Работал кочегаром на пароходе, рабочим на ранчо в Монтане. Пробовал себя в драматургии, но для заработка переключился на актёрскую профессию. В начале 1940-х учился актёрскому мастерству в Голливуде, играл небольшие роли на сцене и в кино.

В январе 1944 Райан, получив гарантии по контракту с RKO Radio Pictures, вступил в Корпус морской пехоты США, служил инструктором по строевой подготовке в Кэмп-Пендлтоне (Сан-Диего). Там он подружился с писателем и будущим кинорежиссёром Ричардом Бруксом.

Первой заметной ролью Райана стал убийца-антисемит в фильме-нуар «Перекрёстный огонь» (1947) по роману Брукса; эта роль принесла ему единственную номинацию на «Оскар» как лучшему актёру второго плана. Затем Райан работал с такими режиссёрами, как Николас Рэй, Энтони Манн, Сэмюэл Фуллер, Роберт Уайз. В 1960-х самыми заметными стали его роли в фильмах «Грязная дюжина» Роберта Олдрича и «Дикая банда» Сэма Пекинпа. Одновременно Райан выступал на Бродвее, много работал на телевидении.

Actress Shannon Staller was born in Zurich, Switzerland, to Joachim, an electrical engineer, and Edith, a business woman. She has one brother, Justin. She was educated at Gymnase de la Cite, Lausanne before going to University in Zurich.

data.biography:
Eero "Käkä" Milonoff (born 1 May 1980) is a Finnish actor. He graduated from the Helsinki Theatre Academy in 2005, and he works as a freelance actor. In 2008, he was nominated for the Jussi Award for Best Actor for his role in the biopic Ganes (2007) as the drummer and vocalist Remu Aaltonen of the rock band Hurriganes.

Milonoff is of German, Russian, and Swedish descent on his father's side. His father is the theatre and film director Pekka Milonoff, and he has three brothers: Aleksi, Juho, and Tuomas, of whom the latter two also work in the film and television industry.
data.name: Eero Milonoff

data.biography:
Eero Milonoff (s. 1. toukokuuta 1980 Helsinki) on suomalainen näyttelijä. Hän valmistui Teatterikorkeakoulusta vuonna 2005 ja toimii freelance-näyttelijänä.

Milonoff on näytellyt muun muassa elokuvissa Tyttö sinä olet tähti ja Hymyilevä mies sekä televisiosarjassa Koukussa. Vuonna 2007 ensi-iltansa saaneessa Ganes-elokuvassa Milonoff näytteli Remu Aaltosta.

Milonoff sai tammikuussa 2019 parhaasta miessivuosasta ruotsalaisen Guldbagge-palkinnon. Hän näytteli fantasiaelokuvassa Raja (Gräns) yhteiskunnan ulkopuolelle vetäytynyttä erakkoa Vorea.

Milonoffin veljiä ovat Aleksi Milonoff, Juho Milonoff sekä Tuomas Milonoff. Heidän isänsä on ohjaaja ja näyttelijä Pekka Milonoff.
data.name: Eero Milonoff

data.biography:
Lee joined TCS on a contract in 1995 after emerging as 1st runner-up in the male category of the Star Search programme in 1995. He worked as a factory worker, salesman and part-time model before joining star search in 1995. Lee first started acting in Chinese-language television dramas produced by Channel 8.

Lee rose to prominence in his career after winning the Best Actor award at the Star Awards 1997 for his role as a hanjian in the television drama The Price of Peace, set in Japanese-occupied Singapore during World War II. In 1998, he starred as Yang Guo in The Return of the Condor Heroes, an adaptation of Louis Cha's novel of the same title. He was voted in as Taiwan's Most Popular MediaCorp Male Artiste at the Star Awards 1998 for his performance. Since then, Lee has acted in many television series jointly produced by Singapore and other countries in the Asia-Pacific region, co-starring with actors from Hong Kong and Taiwan, such as Nadia Chan, Vincent Chiao, Jimmy Lin and Jordan Chan.

Apart from acting, Lee also recorded the theme songs of MediaCorp's television dramas. He released his first solo album in 1999 and another one in 2002.

At the 2010 Star Awards, Lee was awarded the coveted All-Time Favourite Artiste Award after winning the Top 10 Most Popular Male Artistes award from 1997–1998, 2000, 2002-2009 respectively with long-time colleague Mark Lee. He became the first non-Singaporean artiste to win the award. More recently, Lee has also ventured into hosting and has hosted several travel and food programmes. He was nominated for the Best Info-Ed Show Host award at the Star Awards 2012.
data.name: Christopher Lee

data.biography: Mike Markoff is a classically trained actor that began his career in the Chicago theater scene as a child- where he studied at Second City and The Chicago Shakespeare Theater. He later took to New York where he trained under legendary acting coach Anthony Abeson- shortly thereafter, his career took off in Los Angeles on the large and small screen with over 50 film and television credits. Mike is known for his wide range as well as his intense preparation and commitment to character roles both dramatic and comedic, with a particular prowess for emotionally complex roles and antihero characters. Most recently, he was handpicked by Richard Linklater for the 2023 film Hitman - in which he plays opposite Glen Powell. He also stars in the highly anticipated drama When Jack Came Back, playing the titular role of Jack opposite legendary actors Lindsay Wagner and Lance Henrikson.
data.name: Mike Markoff

data.biography: 迈克·马尔科夫（Mike Markoff）是一位受过古典训练的演员，他从小就在芝加哥戏剧界开始了他的职业生涯，在那里他就读于第二城市和芝加哥莎士比亚剧院。后来他去了纽约，在传奇表演教练安东尼·阿贝森（Anthony Abeson）的指导下接受训练——此后不久，他的职业生涯在洛杉矶的大银幕和小银幕上起飞，拥有50多部电影和电视作品。迈克以其广泛的范围以及他对戏剧和喜剧角色的紧张准备和承诺而闻名，尤其擅长处理情感复杂的角色和反英雄角色。最近，他被理查德·林克莱特精心挑选为 2023 年的电影《杀手》——他在片中与格伦鲍威尔演对手戏。他还出演了备受期待的电视剧《当杰克回来了》，在传奇演员林赛·瓦格纳和兰斯·亨里克森的对面扮演杰克的名义角色。
data.name: 迈克·马尔科夫

data.biography: 邁克·馬爾科夫（Mike Markoff）是一位受過古典訓練的演員，他從小就在芝加哥戲劇界開始了他的職業生涯，在那裏他就讀於第二城市和芝加哥莎士比亞劇院。後來他去了紐約，在傳奇表演教練安東尼·阿貝森（Anthony Abeson）的指導下接受訓練——此後不久，他的職業生涯在洛杉磯的大銀幕和小銀幕上起飛，擁有 50 多部電影和電視作品。邁克以其廣泛的範圍以及他對戲劇和喜劇角色的緊張準備和承諾而聞名，尤其擅長處理情感複雜的角色和反英雄角色。最近，他被理查德·林克萊特精心挑選為 2023 年的電影《躁爸爸狂媽媽》——他在片中與格倫鮑威爾演對手戲。他還出演了備受期待的電視劇《當傑克回來了》，在傳奇演員林賽·瓦格納和蘭斯·亨里克森的對面扮演傑克的名義角色。
data.name: 邁克·馬爾科夫

Radha Rani Amber Indigo Ananda Mitchell (born November 12, 1973) is an Australian actress. She started her career acting in various Australian television series and films, and later appeared in Hollywood films such as High Art, Pitch Black, Phone Booth, Man on Fire, Finding Neverland, Melinda and Melinda, Silent Hill and The Crazies.

data.name: Radha Mitchell

data.biography:
Radha Rani Amber Indigo Ananda Mitchell, ausztrál színésznő, 1973. november 12-én született Melbourne-ben. Édesanyja modell, majd divattervező volt, édesapja pedig a filmiparban dolgozik, akik Radha fiatalkorában elváltak. A „Radha” nevet egy hindu istennőről kapta, a Rani és az Ananda pedig indiai eredetű. A St. Michael középiskolába járt, és 1992-ben érettségizett.

Michell a „Sugar and Spice” sorozatban kezdte a karrierjét 1988-ban. Majd 1994-ben vendégszerepet vállalt a „Neighbours” sorozatban, de később, 1996 és 1997 között állandó szereplővé vált. 1997-ben két díjnyertes filmben is szerepelt, melyek a „High Art” és az „Everything Put Together”.

Az ismertséget az Oscar-díjas „Finding Neverland” című film hozta meg neki, amelyben Johnny Depp-pel és Kate Winslettel szerepelt együtt. Később játszott még a „Melinda and Melinda”, „Mozart and the Whale” és a „Silent Hill filmekben is. 2008-ban szerepet kapott a „Rogue”, a „Henry Poole Is Here” és a „The Children of Huang Si” filmekben.

A „The Waiting City” című filmben nyújtott alakításáért a Legjobb Színésznőnek járó díjat kapta meg 2010-ben az Antipodes Film Fesztiválon, Franciaországban. 2013-ban Michell a „Red Widow” sorozatban megkapta a főszerepet, illetve játszott még az „Olympus Has Fallen” akció-thrillerben Gerard Butler mellett.

Ра́да Ра́ни Э́мбер И́ндиго Ана́нда Ми́тчелл (англ. Radha Rani Amber Indigo Ananda Mitchell; род. 12 ноября 1973, Мельбурн) — австралийская актриса, наиболее известная по своим ролям в фильмах «Чёрная дыра» и «Сайлент Хилл». Рада родилась в Мельбурне и была единственным ребёнком рано разведённых родителей. Воспитана в духе индуистской культуры и религии. Её отец — режиссёр, а мать — дизайнер. Закончила гимназию святого Михаила (англ.) в Австралии. Её первое имя «Рада (англ. Radha)» — санскритского происхождения. В индуизме так звали возлюбленную бога Кришны. Рада — вегетарианка и практикует йогу.

Митчелл начала свою карьеру на австралийском телевидении в детском телесериале. В 1994 году в сериале «Соседи» сыграла две роли с совершенно разными характерами. В этом шоу она участвовала 3 года.

В 1997 году за участие в двух фильмах — «Высокое искусство» и «Все вместе» награждёна кинопремией «Независимый дух». Среди других её фильмов в том числе «Чёрная дыра» вместе с Вин Дизелем, «Телефонная будка» с Колином Фарреллом и «Гнев» вместе с Дензелом Вашингтоном.

Рада Митчелл снялась также в фильме «Волшебная страна», главные роли в котором сыграли Джонни Депп и Кейт Уинслет. Все звёзды этого фильма получили премию гильдии киноактёров в номинации выдающиеся роли. В рейтинге «Горячая 100 в 2002» журнала Maxim заняла 45-е место.

В 2005 году Митчелл сыграла главную роль в фильме Вуди Аллена «Мелинда и Мелинда», сыграла роль Изабеллы в фильме «Без ума от любви». Также снималась в «Сайлент Хилл», фильме ужасов 2006 года по мотивам одноимённой культовой японской видеоигры. В 2008 году Митчелл снималась в фильме «Крокодил» с Майклом Вартаном, «Генри Пул уже здесь», а также «Дети Хуан Ши».

Последние фильмы с участием Рады Митчелл — это фантастический боевик 2009 года «Суррогаты», снятый режиссёром Джонатаном Мостоу с Брюсом Уиллисом в главной роли. И «Кодекс вора» 2008 года — криминальный фильм режиссёра Мими Ледера. Также Рада появилась во второй части фильма ужасов «Сайлент Хилл 2».

Митчел исполнила главную роль в сериале «Красная вдова», премьера которого состоялась в 2013 году на телеканале ABC.
data.name: Рада Митчелл

data.biography: Radha Mitchell występowała już jako nastolatka. Okazało się wkrótce, że jest wszechstronnie utalentowaną aktorką. Potrafi wcielać się zarówno w postacie energiczne i szalone, jak też poważne i dojrzałe. Pierwszy raz pojawiła się przed kamerami w 1988 roku, w serialu "Sugar and Spice". Następnie pojawiły się role w telewizyjnych tasiemcach: "Phoenix", "Law of the Land", "Blue Heelers". Przełomem w jej karierze okazał się występ w komedii romantycznej "Love and Other Catastrophes" w 1996 roku, gdzie wcieliła się w postać Danni, studentki zafascynowanej filmową Mią. Pierwszym amerykańskim filmem Radhy była "Sztuka wysublimowanej fotografii" Lisy Cholodenko z 1998 roku. Po kreacji w "Koszmarnej Wizji" postanowiła zaistnieć w głównym nurcie kina. Rok 2000 przyniósł rolę w "Pitch Black", natomiast dwa lata później pojawiła się w "Telefonie" razem z Colinem Farrellem. W 2004 roku wcieliła się w rolę Mary Barrie w obrazie "Marzyciel", gdzie stworzyła wielowymiarowy obraz zimnej kobiety, cierpiącej z powodu niezrozumienia przez męża. Po roli w "Marzycielu" z propozycją zagrania roli tytułowej bohaterki w filmie "Melinda i Melinda" wystąpił Woody Allen. Radha wcieliła się w postać tej samej kobiety w dwóch wersjach - komediowej i tragicznej. W tym samym czasie wyreżyserowała także obraz "Four Reasons". 2005 rok to rola w komediodramacie "Mozart and the Whale" u boku Josha Hartnetta. Rok później pojawiła się w thrillerze "PU-239" oraz horrorze "Rogue". Rola Rose DaSlivy w "Silent Hill" przyniosła jej sławę i uznanie widzów. Aktorka w 2012 roku ponownie wcieliła się w jej postać w filmie "Silent Hill: Apokalipsa".

Η Ράντα Μίτσελ (γεννήθηκε στις 12 Νοεμβρίου 1973) είναι Αυστραλή ηθοποιός. Ξεκίνησε την καριέρα της παίζοντας σε διάφορες αυστραλιανές τηλεοπτικές σειρές και ταινίες, ενώ αργότερα εμφανίστηκε σε ταινίες του Χόλιγουντ όπως High Art, Pitch Black, Phone Booth, Man on Fire, Finding Neverland, Melinda and Melinda, Silent Hill και The Crazies.

澳洲女演員，曾與多位大師級導演合作，包含伍迪艾倫、喬伊舒馬克、東尼史考特及馬克佛斯特等。她的電影代表作有《星際傳奇》、《尋找新樂園》、《絕命鈴聲》、《火線救援》、《雙面瑪琳達》、《屍心瘋》，曾與凱文貝肯合演《黑暗來臨》，也參與傑瑞德巴特勒的《全面攻佔：倒數救援》和《全面攻佔2：倫敦救援》演出。

電視方面，蕾達哈米契爾	曾領銜主演ABC戲劇影集《血玫瑰》。她目前有客串演出影集《西鎮警魂》；以及演出好評影集《羅曼諾夫後裔》。蕾達哈米契爾因演出《失蹤風暴》贏得澳洲影評人獎的最佳女主角獎。
澳大利亚女演员。她的职业生涯始于各种澳大利亚电视连续剧和电影，后来出现在好莱坞电影中，如《高雅艺术》、《漆黑》、《电话亭》、《着火的人》、《寻找梦幻岛》、《梅琳达和梅琳达》、《寂静岭》和《疯子》。

朱致靈，1995年9月24日出生於江蘇省江陰市，中國內地影視男演員。

2017年，主演科幻青春劇《同學兩億歲》，因此進入演藝圈[1]。2019年，出演的青春校園勵志劇《奮鬥吧，少年！》和青春運動勵志劇《極限17：扣殺》相繼播出[2]。2020年，出演的古裝愛情輕奇幻劇《離人心上》播出[6]。2021年，出演的電視劇《玉樓春》播出[12]。2022年，主演的古裝勵志美食劇《尚食》播出[7]；同年，主演的古裝愛情電影《剿匪女俠樊梨花》上線[11]。2023年，主演的古裝反套路劇《城主是我的》和都市愛情劇《危情關係》先後播出[8] [9]。

data.biography: Born in Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan, Boyd Banks started his entertainment career at 17, when he won a contest for Best Stand Up Comedian in Edmonton, Alberta. After spending several years doing comedy in Vancouver, British Columbia, Banks moved to Toronto, where he began acting. Boyd's first roles were in various comedy series such as the cult favourite The Kids in the Hall (1988). His unique character looks and subtle performances on camera caught the eye of Toronto's top casting directors and Banks now works regularly in film and television from comedies to murder mysteries!
data.name: Boyd Banks

data.biography: 博伊德·班克斯（Boyd Banks）出生于萨斯喀彻温省的穆斯乔（Moose Jaw），17岁时开始了他的娱乐生涯，当时他赢得了阿尔伯塔省埃德蒙顿（Edmonton）的最佳单口喜剧演员比赛。在不列颠哥伦比亚省温哥华做了几年喜剧后，班克斯搬到了多伦多，在那里他开始表演。博伊德的第一个角色是在各种喜剧系列中，例如最受欢迎的《大厅里的孩子们》（1988 年）。他独特的角色外表和在镜头前的微妙表演引起了多伦多顶级选角导演的注意，班克斯现在经常在电影和电视中工作，从喜剧到谋杀之谜！
data.name: 博伊德·班克斯

data.biography: 博伊德·班克斯（Boyd Banks）出生於薩斯喀徹温省的穆斯喬（Moose Jaw），17 歲時開始了他的娛樂生涯，當時他贏得了阿爾伯塔省埃德蒙頓（Edmonton）的最佳單口喜劇演員比賽。在不列顛哥倫比亞省温哥華做了幾年喜劇後，班克斯搬到了多倫多，在那裏他開始表演。博伊德的第一個角色是在各種喜劇系列中，例如最受歡迎的《大廳裏的孩子們》（1988 年）。他獨特的角色外表和在鏡頭前的微妙表演引起了多倫多頂級選角導演的注意，班克斯現在經常在電影和電視中工作，從喜劇到謀殺之謎！
data.name: 博伊德·班克斯

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Katie Griffin (born January 14, 1973) is a Canadian actress, voice actress and singer. She has had roles in several television movies and feature films. In cartoons, her best-known roles include the voices of Sailor Mars in the original English dub of Sailor Moon, and Alex in Totally Spies!. She is also the voice of Laugh-a-Lot Bear in Care Bears: Journey to Joke-a-lot and as a plush toy. She also voiced Farmer Shire in Corn & Peg

data.biography:
Jean-Benoît "JB" Blanc was born in Paris, France to an English mother and a French father. He moved with his mother to Yorkshire, England at the age of four, where he was raised and attended school, eventually graduating from The Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) in 1990.

He worked extensively in theater in Britain for over 15 years, including a three-year stint at London's Royal National Theater. His theater work encompassed everything from avant-garde physical theater companies to world tours of Shakespeare plays and classical Greek theater.

His film career was essentially launched by his highly acclaimed role as Luigi Vampa in 2002's The Count of Monte Cristo, and following that success, he moved to Los Angeles where he now lives. Film and TV roles soon followed and he has worked on well over 30 TV shows in the US, including Breaking Bad, Better Call Saul, Barry, Shameless, NCIS: LA, Burn Notice, The Unit, Prison Break, CSI: NY, Nikita, NYPD Blue and others, and many films, including his recent role as Bashkim in 2017's War Dogs.

JB is also a highly accomplished voice actor and director with projects in film, animation, video games, anime, and commercials. His animation work includes All Hail King Julien, Dragons: Race To The Edge, Scooby Doo, Trip Tank, Turbo Fast, Pickle and Peanut, Regular Show, Penn Zero, The Avengers: Earth's Mightiest Heroes, Guardians of the Galaxy, and Avengers Assemble. He has over 170 video game credits, totaling over 400 characters, including Rost in Horizon Zero Dawn, The Admin in Minecraft Story Mode, Bane in Telltale Batman, Arkham Origins and others, many projects for Blizzard Entertainment and the Uncharted franchise. He has been the voice director on various video games: Fortnite, Middle earth: Shadow of Mordor and Shadow of War, Lego Batman 3, Lego Dimensions, XCOM 2, Mafia III, Overwatch, World of Warcraft, World of Warcraft: Legion, Hearthstone, Diablo III and Heroes of the Storm.
data.name: JB Blanc
